settings.birthday_email_body:
In the words of Burton Hills,

"Happiness is not a destination, It is a method of life."

May you find much to fill your life with happiness on this special day and throughout the coming year.

 

As your insurance agent, I don't always have the opportunity to connect with you as often as I'd like.

But on this special day, know I am thinking of you. Wishing you a day filled with joy and a year that is all you could hope for.

Happy Birthday!
settings.quotesheet_body:
Hi [firstname]!

As promised, here are a few plans that I have put together for you based on our previous discussion.  After researching the different Insurance Companies in your area these are the options that best fit what you were looking for.   Please look them over along with the attached brochures and let me know what questions you have.  I look forward to our phone appointment (ENTER DATE/TIME).   Please try to have the plans in front of you when I call so that we can review them together!

Click this link for your Quote: [quotesheet]


Wishing you good health,
settings.appointment_subject: Your Appointment Reminder to discuss your Health Insurance options!
settings.appointment_body:
Hi [firstname],

On [apptdate] at [appttimelocal], we have a phone appointment to discuss your health insurance options for the up-coming year. If this time does not work please give me a call or drop me a note as soon as possible to reschedule.


PLEASE CLICK THE FOLLOWING LINK TO CONFIRM YOUR APPOINTMENT: 
[confirmlink] 

With the all the changes in health care reform times are very limited.


Keep in mind, there may be some system issues.  If I start to run behind we will be in contact with you to give you a new estimated time or reschedule if the new time does not work.  


Thank you for your cooperation…

buckets.name: New Leads - RSJ  text Drip - Dec 2020
Beth's Bucket
buckets.tooltip: Im not sure what this is for....

buckets.name: Small Businesses
buckets.click_to_dial_script:
Hi__, This is Latrica Schooley with Activate Benefits Group a HST company,  Do you have a minute? Great___. I am sure you are  busy so I will be brief. I am calling because I have worked with companies like yours so that they can
1. reduce their healthcare spend
2. Increase their benefits
3. Protect their most valuable assets without increasing cost.
Can I ask a couple of questions to see if this would be a good fit.
1) If you could eliminate 3 biggest headaches at work would that be
2) What  are your biggest challenges when it comes to human capital3) Can you or your staff afford to miss three to six months of work without being detriment to you and those you care about
Would it be safe to say, if there was a way for you to ________ then this could be of value to explore? Let's get together on_____is the beginning of the week or the end of the week.

buckets.tooltip: Hi, I am Dan your health insurance guy here to help you get coverage. To get started just text me back and we will connect. Your coverage will start very soon. My number is 314-805-6581.

buckets.name: Dan's Drip number 2
buckets.tooltip: I thought I'd give you another shout out. Great coverage starts with just a click. Health Insurance is simplified by using an experienced broker. Call Dan at 314-805-6581

buckets.name: Shipp, D * Text Drip
buckets.tooltip: Health coverage is very important. To get the best coverage at the best prices trust in an experienced broker. I am licensed with many carriers that offer great coverage. Call Dan 314-805-6581

buckets.click_to_dial_script: Hi,  It's Denise the Health Insurance Broker!   There is still time to make changes and  review your health insurance options.   Do you have 15 minutes  to chat?

buckets.click_to_dial_script: Hi my name is Jen with Pixie Health Insurance, I see that you inquired about Health insurance recently.  Can I give you some information on that? I know I can save your family some money if you let me.

buckets.click_to_dial_script: Hi, my name is {agentfirst}.  This is just a quick courtesy call regarding self employed health insurance.  There's a new program for self employed people to get comprehensive insurance affordably.  Would you like FREE help finding a plan?

buckets.name: Small Biz - RECYCLED
buckets.click_to_dial_script: Hi, my name is {agentfirst} with HST.  This is just a quick courtesy call regarding health and dental insurance.  Are you happy with your current situation, or would you like FREE help finding an affordable health plan?

buckets.name: Small Biz - APPT SETTER
buckets.tooltip: Small Businesses (<4 empl) for Appt Setters Only
buckets.click_to_dial_script:
Hi, this is {agentfirst}, with HST, just doing a real quick courtesy call.  

Im reaching out to see if youre aware of a new program for self employed people to obtain comprehensive health insurance at an affordable price.  Are you happy with your current situation, or would you like some help finding a plan... its completely free to work with us?
